title.v: thông tin xuất kho tự động

items.key: status = '1' and truc_tiep ='1' and ma_bp in (select ma_bp from dmbp where status = '1')
items.check: truc_tiep ='1' and ma_bp in (select ma_bp from dmbp where status = '1')

command.text:
declare @message nvarchar(4000), @unitName nvarchar(1023) select @unitName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_dvcs else ten_dvcs2 end from dmdvcs where ma_dvcs = @@unit select @message = 'this._unitCode=''' + @@unit + ''';this._unitName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@unitName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';activeForm(this);'
&Check;

declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Đơn vị %s1, bộ phận %s2, tài khoản vật tư %s3 đã có trong danh mục khai báo thông tin xuất kho tự động.' else N'The record consisting of Unit %s1, Department %s2, Inventory Account %s3 already exists.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Bản ghi hiện thời đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'This item has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where &k1;) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, replace(replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_dvcs)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_bp)), '%s3', rtrim(@tk_vt)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where &k2;) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, @$recordHasBeenChanged as message return end if not (&k3;) begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (&k2;)) and (&k1;)) begin select 'ma_bp' as field, replace(replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_dvcs)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_bp)), '%s3', rtrim(@tk_vt)) as message return end end

declare @ma_kho varchar(32), @ten_kho nvarchar(512), @dv_yn bit, @vi_tri_yn bit select @ma_kho = ma_kho from @@table where &k1; select @dv_yn = case when exists(select 1 from dmkho where ma_dvcs = @@unit and ma_kho = @ma_kho) then 1 else 0 end select @ten_kho = ten_kho%l from dmkho where ma_kho = @ma_kho if exists(select 1 from dmvitri where ma_kho = @ma_kho) select @vi_tri_yn = 1 select @dv_yn as dv_yn, @ten_kho as ten_kho%l, @vi_tri_yn as vi_tri_yn return
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where &k1;
if @@admin <> 1 begin if not exists(select 1 from sysunitrights where user_id = @@userID and ma_dvcs = @ma_dvcs and r_del = 1) begin select '$NotAuthorized' as message return end end

action.text: select cast(case when exists(select 1 from dmvitri where ma_kho = @ma_kho) then 1 else 0 end as bit) as vi_tri_yn return
